rationale: The US-Iran peace deal nearing signature is the most impactful development for Americans — potential end to a conflict involving US forces and oil market implications; SpaceX IPO and OpenAI lawsuit are notable domestic market/policy events.

top_events.title: US and Iran signal peace deal within reach; UAE unlocks frozen Iranian funds
top_events.summary: A US-Iran deal could end active US military engagement in the region, lower oil prices, and reduce geopolitical risk — a significant positive shift for American consumers and markets if signed.

top_events.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on stock market
top_events.summary: SpaceX's stock market debut drives a historic wealth milestone; relevant to US investors and market sentiment, though direct impact on most Americans' daily lives is limited.

top_events.title: Mother sues OpenAI after daughter's death linked to ChatGPT use
top_events.summary: A high-profile US lawsuit against OpenAI over AI-linked harm adds pressure for domestic AI safety regulation, potentially affecting how AI products are developed and governed in the US.
